name: Groom Grand Prix
short_description: Groom Racing: Engage in dynamic 2D arcade races, ensuring your bride's precious gift remains undamaged. Navigate challenging tracks with precision. Features vibrant pixel art graphics.
detailed_description:
Feel the thrill and responsibility in "Groom Racing"! Take part in exhilarating arcade races where you control a car and must be extra careful not to damage the precious gift for your bride. Navigate through challenging tracks and ensure your special present arrives safely.

Features:

Dynamic and intense 2D car races
Demands precision and accuracy in car control
Vibrant 2D pixel art graphics
